title: tephroseris papposa subsp. kitaibelii
intro: Tephroseris papposa subsp. kitaibelii, also known as Kitaibel's mountain everlasting, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Tephroseris papposa subsp. kitaibelii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as an infusion or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
